comment: Performed repeat logging pass across reservoir from 4025 m to 3953 m. RIH to 4020 m.
Dropped 3" hollow drift. Flow checked well - Well static.
POOH BHA from 375 m to 53 m racking back stand of 5 1/2" HWDP, accelerator and jar stand and 5 stands 5 1/2" HWDP.
No activities in Aux due to BHA handling.
Flow checked well - Well loosing 0.16 m3/hrs static.
Pumped slug. POOH 8 1/2" drilling BHA from 3520 m to BHA at 375 m on 5 1/2" DP.

Drilled 8 1/2" hole from 4049 m to section TD at 4077 m. Parameters: 160 rpm / 40 - 43 Knm torque, 2200 lpm / 200 bar, WOB 0.5 - 9 MT, ROP 40 m/hrs, average ROP 30 m/hrs.
- Recorded TD survey at 4056.50 m - 202,91 deg AZ - 12.82 deg incl.
- At TD well positioned 15.3 m left of and 2 m above planned trajectory.
Correlated depth.
Logged up from TD at 4077 m to 3749 m, some 30 m inside 9 5/8" casing shoe. RIH to 4025 m.
Loaded RA sources into wireline TS.
Performed TBT for building 7" GRE tubing in Aux simultaneous with running wireline. Performed TBT for loading RA sources. Meanwhile flow checked well - Well loosing 0.08 m3/hrs static.
Build 9 stands of 7" GRE tubing - Total of 46 stands of 7" GRE tubing racked back.
Pumped OOH with 500 lpm from 3970 m to 3730 m +- one stand inside 9 5/8" casing shoe. Recorded torque parameters in preparation for liner running: 5 rpm / 28 KNm, 10 rpm / 27 Knm, 15 rpm / 26 KNm.
POOH BHA from 24 m to surface laying out TeleScope MWD with 8 3/8" NM ILS and Ecoscope LWD with 8 3/8" RXS stab and Powerdrive with bit. Bit grading: 1-0-CT-N-X-IN-BT-TD.
Recorded 7 pressure points: 7 good tests.
Removed RA source.
POOH 8 1/2" drilling BHA from 3696 m to 3520 m on 5 stands wet and verified correct pipe displacement.
Build 9 stands of 7" GRE tubing while running Wireline - Total of 55 stands of 7" GRE tubing racked back.
POOH BHA from 53 m to 24 m laying out Well Commander and ATS sub, 6.75" NM DC and SonicScope.
Cleared and cleaned rig floor. Performed TBT for wireline rig up.
RIH with Wireline TS#1A from surface to TD at 4077 m. Passed 9 5/8" casing shoe at 3777 m in third attempt with increased running speed.

Made up wireline toolstring 1A (Pressure points): AIT - PEX - HNGS - XPT - GR. Rigged up remaining wireline equipment including sheaves. Feed wireline through sheave in V-door and TDS and connected to toolstring. Completed surface testing.

Further investigated oil leak. Indications of hydraulic fluid leaking into transmission from motor. Decision taken to change out hydraulic motor and transmission. Commenced mobilization of spare parts.

Circulated 3 x bottoms up and well clean with 2400 lpm / 210 bar. Conditioned 1.18 sg mud for upcoming wireline operation. Rotated string with 130 rpm and reciprocated. Pulled back to 3970 m racking back one stand on each bottoms up. No significant losses.
Flow checked well - Well static. Retrieved drift.

Installed new transmission and hydraulic motor on wireline winch.
Note: 
10:30 - 24:00 hrs: Flow checked well - Well loosing 0.03 m3/hrs static.
Build 3 stands of 7" GRE tubing while running Wireline - Total of 58 stands of 7" GRE tubing racked back.
No activities in Aux due to PGM electrical cable failure.
Made up wireline toolstring #1B (Sidewall cores): MSCT - GR - LEHQT. Connected wireline to toolstring. Completed surface testing.
POOH wireline toolstring #1B from 300 m to surface. Secured toolstring.
Investigated oil leak. Verified leak coming from winch motor and / or transmission. Decision taken to POOH.
Build 2 stands of 7" GRE tubing while running Wireline - Total of 60 stands of 7" GRE tubing racked back.
Recorded 14 pressure points: 3 good tests, 10 tight test, 1 supercharged test. Total recorded numbers of pressure point: 21, hereof 10 good tests and 10 tight tests, 1 supercharged test.
Awaited new spare parts from town. New hydraulic motor and transmission arrived on rig at 22:15 hrs. Meanwhile prepared worksite for installation of new components.
RIH with Wireline toolstring#1B from surface to 300 m - Observed oil leak from winch transmission.
POOH wireline TS #1A from 4031 m to surface.
Disconnected and removed old hydraulic motor and transmission from wireline winch.
Removed RA sources. Broke out and laid out wireline TS #1A to deck.
No activities in Aux due to POOH with wireline TS and handling wireline BHA.
Build 8 stands of 7" GRE tubing while running Wireline - Total of 68 stands of 7" GRE tubing racked back.
RIH with Wireline toolstring #1B from surface to 4040 m. Passed 9 5/8" casing shoe at 3777 m with no restrictions.

B/O Wireline toolstring #1B and laid out same. Rigged down WL sheaves.
- Core recovery: 1 full recovery and 21 with partial/ fragmented recovery.
Cleaned and cleared drill floor.
Pulled out of hole with WL toolstring #1B from 3972 m to surface.
Correlated depth. Pulled back to first core station at 3997 m.
Continued installation of new transmission and hydraulic motor on wireline winch. Tested winch.
Cut 30 cores in interval from 3999 m to 3972 m.
Build 13 stands of 7" GRE tubing while running Wireline - Total of 81 stands of 7" GRE tubing racked back.
Build 13 stands of 7" GRE tubing - Total of 38 stands of 7" GRE tubing racked back.

Drilled 8 1/2" hole from 3788 m to 3808 m - Experienced erratic torque and pack-off tendencies throughout entire interval. Recorded dynamic FIT to 1.38 sg EMW. Parameters: 100 rpm / 40 - 45 KNm torque, 2000 - 2400 lpm / 175 - 225 bar, WOB 5 - 14 MT, ROP 15 - 40 m/hrs, average ROP 20 m/hrs.
Picked up stand of 3 x 5 1/2" HWDP + 1 x 8" DC from setback. Broke out 8" DC  and changed out with 5 1/2 HWDP single from deck. Racked back HWDP stand.

Cleaned out rathole from 3777 m to TD at 3788 m in 3 m stages - Observed clear indications of unconsolidated cement in rathole with pack-off tendencies and erratic torque. Parameters: 70 rpm / 30 - 42 Knm torque, 1300 - 2000 lpm / 98 - 193 bar.
Installed RA sources in LWD.

Drilled 8 1/2" hole from 3808 m to top reservoir at 3970 m. Parameters: 160 rpm / 38 - 42 KNm torque, 2000 - 2200 lpm / 168 - 200 bar, WOB 4 - 13 MT, ROP 40 - 80 m/hrs, average ROP 33 m/hrs - ROP limited by challenged directional control (Unable to drop inclination as per plan).
Drilled 8 1/2" hole from 3970 m to 4049 m. Parameters: 160 rpm / 40 - 43 Knm torque, 2200 lpm / 190 - 200 bar, WOB 0.5 - 9 MT, ROP 40 m/hrs, average ROP 35 m/hrs.
Build 3 stands of 7" GRE tubing. Struggled to calibrate and align casing cassette tong. Changed inserts. Trouble shoot make / brake paddle.
Changed PUE and adjusted fingerboard for 7" tubing.
RIH BHA from 34 m to 53 m on 6.75" NM DC, AST sub and WellCommander assembly with float.

Made up 8 1/2" PowerDrive drilling BHA: Picked up PD assembly with 8 1/2" PDC bit, 8 3/8" RSX Stab and Ecoscope LWD. RIH PD assembly on 8 3/8" NM ILS + Telescope LWD assembly and SonicScope collar to 34 m.
RIH BHA from 364 m to 3686 m on 5 1/2" DP. Filled pipe.
Washed down BHA from 3686 m and tagged cement plugs / FC at expected depth at 3730 m.
RIH 8 1/2" drilling BHA form 53 m to 364 m on 5 stands 5 1/2" HWDP, jar stand, accelerator stand and stand of 5 1/2" HWDP.

Drilled out cement plugs and FC from 3730 m to 3732 m. Drilled hard cement from 3732 m to FS at 3776 m. Drilled through FS from 3776 m to 3777 m. Meanwhile reduced MW from 1.45 sg to 1.18 sg. Parameters: 40 - 80 rpm / 30 - 36 KNm torque, 1200 - 1600 lpm / 100 - 163 bar.
Performed choke drill.
